latest.title: SpaceX gains 11% in premarket trading as momentum builds
latest.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030."

latest.title: Japan raises interest rate to highest for 31 years
latest.summary: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.

latest.title: When will social media ban start, and which apps will be affected?
latest.summary: The measures will see apps including TikTok and Snapchat banned for UK teens early in 2027.

latest.title: Nebraska’s Wide, Rolling Domain
latest.summary: The Nebraska Sandhills—the largest system of sand dunes in the Western Hemisphere—stretch across about one-quarter of the state.

radar.title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
radar.summary: The environment secretary says the deal does not do enough for consumers or the environment.

radar.title: Trump may release US-Iran deal before Friday, Vance says
radar.summary: The US vice-president says the agreement is "about a page and a half" and "very general", meaning many details will be worked out later.

radar.title: Qualcomm CEO says AI agents will replace apps — as chip giant works on 40 new AI-powered…
radar.summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said he is bullish on smart glasses which could eventually become as big as the smartphone.

radar.title: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
radar.summary: A picture in a new school textbook had covered up the naked torso of the famous figurine with dark shading.
